innovations.title: Silent DJ
innovations.shortDescription: Wireless headphone party concept for campus events - multiple music channels without external noise

innovations.title: TV Storage & Replay
innovations.shortDescription: Record live TV, pause, rewind, and replay - DVR concept before TiVo was mainstream
innovations.realWorldAdoption: DVR became standard in cable/satellite boxes by 2005-2007

innovations.title: Music as Ringtones
innovations.shortDescription: Full songs as mobile ringtones instead of monophonic beeps - personalized mobile experience
innovations.realWorldAdoption: Polyphonic and MP3 ringtones became standard 2005-2006

innovations.title: Dual SIM Phones
innovations.shortDescription: Two phone numbers in one device - work and personal separation without carrying two phones
innovations.realWorldAdoption: Dual SIM became mainstream in emerging markets 2007-2009

innovations.title: Universal Health ID
innovations.shortDescription: Single digital health identity for all medical records - portable health history across providers
innovations.realWorldAdoption: India launched Ayushman Bharat Health ID in 2021

innovations.title: 3D Imaging for Diagnosis
innovations.shortDescription: Advanced 3D medical imaging for better diagnosis - holographic visualization of internal organs
innovations.realWorldAdoption: 3D medical imaging and AR surgery planning became standard 2014-2017

innovations.title: Digital Money Vision
innovations.shortDescription: Cashless economy with mobile payments and virtual currency - money as pure digital concept
innovations.realWorldAdoption: UPI launched 2016, India leads world in digital payments by 2020

innovations.title: Moveable Office Dividers
innovations.shortDescription: Flexible workspace partitions for dynamic office layouts - adapt spaces to changing team needs
innovations.realWorldAdoption: Flexible office design became standard in modern workplaces 2015-2017

innovations.title: Dashboard Simplification
innovations.shortDescription: Unified dashboards for data visualization and decision-making - insights at a glance
innovations.realWorldAdoption: Dashboard-first analytics became standard in all SaaS products 2018-2019
